articles.title: We Would Love This Unreleased Carpet Company x Salomon XT-Whisper Colorway To Drop in the Future
articles.summary: When Baltimore-based skate imprint Carpet Company announced its highly anticipated collaboration with Salomon, the sneaker world immediately took notice. The resulting XT‑Whisper Void “Habibi Express” perfectly encapsulated founders Ayman and Osama Abdeldayem’s DIY ethos, merging Salomon’s rugged, trail-ready heritage with Carpet Company’s playful, skate-driven appeal.Leading up to the reveal, the brand dropped a series of conceptual Instagram reels that captured their distinctly irreverent vibe. Tinged with retro-nostalgia and offbeat humor, the narrative centered around a custom, red-horned minivan - the physical embodiment of the "Habibi Express" - decked out with Salomon's logo alongside Carpet Company’s recognizable star-shaped motif. articles.title: India’s Leather Exports Fall 16% in FY ’26 Amid US Tariffs and West Asia Crisis
articles.summary: India’s leather and leather products exports declined 16% in FY ’26 as higher US tariffs, rising input costs and disruptions linked to the West Asia crisis weighed heavily on the sector’s global competitiveness. The downturn reflects mounting pressure on one of India’s key labour-intensive export industries, which has been grappling with slowing international demand, elevated […] The post India’s Leather Exports Fall 16% in FY ’26 Amid US Tariffs and West Asia Crisis appeared first on Apparel Resources .

articles.title: Nike's Mind 001 Flyknit "Bronze Eclipse" Turns the Gradient Up and the Nodes Orange
articles.summary: Name: Nike Mind 001 “Bronze Eclipse”Colorway: Bronze Eclipse/Black/Total OrangeSKU: IR2175-200MSRP: $95 USDRelease Date: TBCNike is preparing another Mind 001 Flyknit colorway for 2026, and the "Bronze Eclipse" might be the most visually cohesive of the Flyknit iterations released so far. A black-to-Bronze Eclipse gradient runs from the top of the Flyknit upper downward, landing on Total Orange foam sphere nodes that glow underneath.Where the “Hyper Royal” Flyknit shifts from black to blue and the “Cucumber Calm” reads soft and pastel, the Bronze Eclipse colorway operates in warmer, richer territory — a metallic earth tone that picks up the Total Orange nodes underneath rather than contrasting against them. articles.title: The Nike Dunk Low "CBGB" Channels Downtown New York's Most Legendary Music Venue Into Distressed Suede and Street Signs
articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low “CBGB”Colorway: Metallic Silver/College Grey-Cave Stone-Off NoirSKU: IB2258-001MSRP: $130 USDRelease Date: June 2Where to Buy: NikeNike is channeling the energy of the legendary CBGB on a Dunk Low, and somehow it doesn’t feel like a stretch. The shoe earns the reference: a distressed upper that reads like the venue's famously poster-plastered walls, street sign labels for Bleecker and Bowery printed on the inner tongues, and the kind of restraint that suggests someone at Nike actually knows why that corner of downtown Manhattan matters.The distressed upper is the right starting point for a CBGB tribute. The torn and worn-in material directly references the venue's famously chaotic interior — walls plastered with overlapping flyers and posters, surfaces accumulated over

articles.title: Nike Is Bringing Back the Iconic KD 6 "Seat Pleasant" in 2027
articles.summary: Name: Nike KD 6 "Seat Pleasant"Colorway: Sonic Yellow/Midnight Navy-Tropical TealSKU: IQ0145-700Retail Price: $135 USDRelease Date: Spring 2027Where to Buy: NikeNostalgia is proving to be a powerful driving force in modern basketball footwear, and Nike is fully leaning into the golden era of Kevin Durant's signature line. While the NBA superstar is currently lacing up his 19th signature model on the court, the Swoosh is taking fans on a trip down memory lane. Widely considered one of the most beloved entries in his entire catalog, the Nike KD 6 is officially making a comeback, headlined by the return of the deeply personal, hometown-inspired "Seat Pleasant" colorway in Spring 2027.Long before he was a multi-time NBA Champion and MVP, Kevin Durant was just a kid honing his craft at the loca

articles.title: Timberland’s Authentic Loafer Is Worth Considering
articles.summary: Name: Timberland Authentic Loafer Colorway: Burgundy, BlackSKU: A2MSCW02, A2MSCEIWMSRP: ¥26,400 JPY (approx. $165 USD)Release Date: Available nowWhere to Buy: BILLY’S ENTTimberland makes some of the most trusted leather in footwear, and the Authentic Loafer is the proof that it doesn’t need a six-inch boot to make its case. It’s a leather-lined, lug-soled slip-on, available now at BILLY’S ENT in Tokyo in Burgundy and Black.The construction is where the Authentic Loafer earns its positioning. Premium Timberland leather covers the upper, carrying the brand's well-documented standards for hide quality and surface treatment. Inside, a leather-lined footbed provides the kind of all-day comfort that makes the slip-on format genuinely practical rather than just convenient. The rubber lug outsole

Hairy suede overlays define the upper's texture, set against cleaner nylon underlays — a pairing that keeps the construction grounded while giving the silhouette its tactile identity. articles.title: OUR LEGACY WORK SHOP Gives the Converse Chuck 70 a Distressed Treatment
articles.summary: Name: OUR LEGACY WORK SHOP x Converse Chuck 70Colorway: "Overdyed Black"SKU: TBCMSRP: $220 USDRelease Date: Available NowWhere to Buy: OUR LEGACYOUR LEGACY WORK SHOP has collaborated with Converse to introduce a heavily distressed rendition of the Chuck 70 in an "Overdyed Black" colorway.The silhouette embodies the Swedish sub-label’s upcycling ethos by utilizing a 100% natural cotton canvas upper that is treated with bio-friendly pigments. This meticulous hand-dyeing process ensures that each individual shoe exhibits subtle variations in pigmentation and is prone to unique fading patterns over time. articles.title: Nike's Dunk Low Retro Premium "Light British Tan Corduroy" Is All Texture, No Noise
articles.summary: Name: Nike Dunk Low Retro Premium “Light British Tan Corduroy”Colorway: TBCSKU: IB7746-201MSRP: $130 USDRelease Date: TBCNike is dressing the Dunk Low Retro Premium in corduroy, and the result is one of the more quietly confident iterations of the silhouette in recent memory. The "Light British Tan Corduroy" colorway pairs panel-by-panel corduroy construction across the upper with a six-tone earth palette, set for a 2026 release at $130 USD.The material story is the whole point here. Corduroy covers the upper panels across the build, running through a range of tan and brown tones — Light British Tan, Cinnamon, Cargo Khaki, Baroque Brown, and Twine — that stack on each other without competing. Off Noir closes the palette at the outsole, providing just enough contrast to keep things grounded

articles.title: Official Look at the New Balance 2010 in “Harbor Grey/Fairweather Blue”
articles.summary: Name: New Balance 2010 “Harbor Grey/Fairweather Blue”Colorway: Harbor Grey/Fairweather BlueSKU: U201056UMSRP: $145 USDRelease Date: 2026New Balance expands on its 2010 sneaker roster with a new “Harbor Grey/Fairweather Blue” colorway, boasting a calming palette with muted pastel accents -- similar to the previously revealed "Vintage Indigo/Faded Teal” variant.The sneaker’s upper combines dark grey suede overlays, smoky synthetic panels and warm-hued, pale grey open mesh underlays that exude an almost pale-pink effect. Cream rope‑style laces add contrast, while the layered “N” branding on the quarters enhances its technical aesthetic. The standout element is the Fairweather Blue ABZORB cushioning, visible through translucent pods wrapping the heel and midfoot plate, which adds energy to the

articles.title: Nike’s Total 90 “Black/Gamma Blue” Swaps the Cleats for Rubber and Brings Y2K Football Back to the Streets
articles.summary: Name: Nike Total 90 “Black/Gamma Blue/Metallic Silver”Colorway: Black/Gamma Blue/Metallic SilverSKU: IQ7631-001MSRP: TBCRelease Date: TBCNike is reviving the Total 90 in a "Black/Gamma Blue/Metallic Silver" colorway. The silhouette — one of the defining football shoes of the Y2K era — returns here in a lifestyle configuration built for the street rather than the pitch.The construction does the translation work cleanly. A quilted upper gives the shoe texture and a distinctly retro register, while an asymmetric lace structure nods directly to the Total 90's original football DNA. The most deliberate departure from the source material is underfoot: the cleated outsole that defined the original has been swapped for a flat rubber unit, repositioning the silhouette firmly in lifestyle territory

Adding a brand-new silhouette to its storied "Made in UK" lineage, the Boston-based brand has officially introduced the Allerdale. Named after the historic Cumbrian district that houses the brand’s legendary Flimby manufacturing facility, the walking-inspired sneaker perfectly balances rugged hiking elements with elevated, everyday sophistication. The Boston-based brand is gearing up to release the highly popular New Balance 9060 in a fresh "Dark Olivine" colorway. Arriving just in time for the warmer months, the Y2K-inspired silhouette perfectly balances its chunky, aggressive architecture with a soft, versatile palette that sneaker enthusiasts will undoubtedly be chasing this summer.As sage green continues to cement itself as a staple hue in modern streetwear, the "Dark Olivine" 9060 masterfully executes the earthy aesthetic.
